mapper.sql: ANSWER_RECORD_ID, QUESTION_ID, USER_ID, SESSION_ID, SELECTED_ANSWER, CORRECT_ANSWER, IS_CORRECT, START_TIME, END_TIME, CREATED_TIME, UPDATED_TIME
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ANSWER_RECORD WHERE ORDER BY END_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ANSWER_RECORD WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ANSWER_RECORD WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_CORRECT = 1
